title: ardisia revoluta
intro: Ardisia revoluta, also known as the Chinese Ardisia or Ardisia vine, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia and China, belonging to the family Myrsinaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Ardisia revoluta are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of extracts, tinctures, or infusions, and is traditionally consumed as a tea or applied topically as a paste or cream.
